title: senecio bithynicus
intro: Senecio bithynicus, also known as Blue Mountain Fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Senecio bithynicus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and bronchitis.
